mnemonics: SILENT CAS: Swap Interrupt Lock Enable No Trouble; Compare And Swap
keyPoints: Hardware provides atomic instructions like TestAndSet and CompareAndSwap to build synchronization primitives.
Spinlocks use these atomic instructions, causing a process to busy-wait while checking a lock condition.
The main advantage of hardware solutions is that they are simple to implement and apply to any number of processes.
commonMistakes: Assuming atomic instructions prevent all race conditions by themselves; they are building blocks for higher-level solutions.
Using a spinlock in a single-processor environment where it wastes CPU cycles; a mutex that blocks the process is more efficient.
